parameters.query:
INSERT INTO jobs_raw (
  external_id, company, title, location, remote, url, description, posted_at, source, content_hash
) VALUES (
  {{$json.external_id}},
  '{{$json.company}}',
  '{{$json.title}}',
  '{{$json.location}}',
  '{{$json.remote}}',
  '{{$json.url}}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{$json.posted_at}}',
  '{{$json.source}}',
  '{{$json.content_hash}}'
)
ON CONFLICT (content_hash) DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO jobs_queue (job_id, status, attempts)
SELECT id, 'pending', 0 FROM jobs_raw WHERE content_hash = '{{$json.content_hash}}'
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
